fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planning line's entry number.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Planning Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the planning line. You can use the planning date for filtering the totals of the project, for example, if you want to see the scheduled usage for a specific month of the year.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number for the planning line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account to which the planning line relates.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the account to which the resource, item or general ledger account is posted, depending on your selection in the Type field.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the resource, item, or G/L account to which this entry applies. You can change the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the resource, item, or general ledger account that should be specified on the planning line. If you later change the No., the quantity you have entered remains on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in the local currency, of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost for the planning line. The amount is in the local currency.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price on the planning line. The total price is in the local currency.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a location code for an item.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the local currency that will be posted to the project ledger.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost for the planning line. The total cost is in the project currency, which comes from the Currency Code field in the Project Card.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price in the project currency on the planning line.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be posted to the project ledger.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number that is applied to the posted item if the planning line was created from the posting of a project journal line.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number that is applied to the posted item if the planning line was created from the posting of a project journal line.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of planning line.

fields.name: Currency Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that will be used to find the exchange rate for the currency in the Currency Date field.

fields.name: Contract Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether this line is a billable line.

fields.name: Job Contract Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the project planning line that the sales line is linked to.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Ledger Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry type of the project ledger entry associated with the planning line.

fields.name: Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the project ledger entry associated with the project planning line.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies that an entry has been created by Business Central and is related to a project ledger entry. The check box is selected automatically.

fields.name: Usage Link
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the Usage Link field applies to the project planning line. When this check box is selected, usage entries are linked to the project planning line. Selecting this check box creates a link to the project planning line from places where usage has been posted, such as the project journal or a purchase line. You can select this check box only if the line type of the project planning line is Budget or Both Budget and Billable.

fields.name: Remaining Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining quantity of the resource, item, or G/L Account that remains to complete a project. The quantity is calculated as the difference between Quantity and Qty. Posted.

fields.name: Remaining Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining total cost for the planning line. The total cost is in the project currency, which comes from the Currency Code field in the Project Card.

fields.name: Remaining Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining total cost (LCY) for the planning line. The amount is in the local currency.

fields.name: Remaining Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be posted to the project ledger.

fields.name: Remaining Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the local currency that will be posted to the project ledger.

fields.name: Qty. Posted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that has been posted to the project ledger, if the Usage Link check box has been selected.

fields.name: Qty. to Transfer to Journal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity you want to transfer to the project journal. Its default value is calculated as quantity minus the quantity that has already been posted, if the Apply Usage Link check box has been selected.

fields.name: Posted Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost that has been posted to the project ledger, if the Usage Link check box has been selected.

fields.name: Posted Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost (LCY) that has been posted to the project ledger, if the Usage Link check box has been selected.

fields.name: Posted Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the project ledger. This field is only filled in if the Apply Usage Link check box selected on the project card.

fields.name: Posted Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the local currency that has been posted to the project ledger. This field is only filled in if the Apply Usage Link check box selected on the project card.

fields.name: Qty. to Transfer to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity you want to transfer to the sales invoice or credit memo. The value in this field is calculated as Quantity - Qty. Transferred to Invoice.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that remains to be invoiced. It is calculated as Quantity - Qty. Invoiced.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is reserved for the project planning line.

fields.name: Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not a reservation can be made for items on the current line. The field is not applicable if the Type field is set to Resource, Cost, or G/L Account.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the selected item will be put away or picked in warehouse and inventory processes. If you specify a bin code in the To-Project Bin Code field on the Location page, that bin will be suggested when you choose the location.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity expressed in the base units of measure.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that is planned to deliver the item connected to the project planning line. For a resource, the planned delivery date is the date that the resource performs services with respect to the project.

fields.name: Price Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method that will be used for price calculation in the item journal line.

fields.name: Cost Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method that will be used for cost calculation in the item journal line.

fields.name: Qty. Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item you have picked for the project planning line.

fields.name: Qty. Picked (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base quantity of the item you have picked for the project planning line.
